problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
